name: Emma
stage: Family-owned · operations head decision-maker · 4 yrs in role
source_note: Synthetic profile based on brief §12.3 (Emma · manufacturing ops head). Used as the solo-problem buyer to drive variability (different archetype from worked-example Maria). Anonymised; no PII.
top_pain: Bookkeeping drudgery — finance manually re-keys ~400 supplier receipts per month; Sage can't read job-numbers off the card transactions.
top_objection: Our accountant won't deal with another tool.
ideal_opener: I saw Brightline's headcount up 18% this year — who's approving supplier card spend across the 3 shifts now?
closing_move: Could I get 20 minutes with you and your Sage admin together — Tuesday 14:00 or Thursday 11:30?

signals.content: Filed annual accounts last month — turnover up 22% year-on-year; full-time headcount up 18%.
Posting: 'Hiring shift supervisor + procurement manager — Sheffield site.'
Operations head shared a carousel: 'Lean manufacturing tools we use across our 3 sites.'
